zh.Bulstrode, Buckinghamshire, , England: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Bulstrode於1522年7月5日出生在英國巴金哈姆爾時，她的父親George Bulstrode37歲，母親Joan Pigott36歲。她於1540年與Thomas Woodward在英國巴金哈姆爾結婚。她去世於1560年12月1日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾厄普頓享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏斯洛。

nameMeanings.name: Bulstrode
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bolstridge
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of Bulstrode, a habitational name from Bulstrode in Buckinghamshire, meaning ‘bull marsh’ from Old English bula ‘bull’ + strōd ‘marshy land’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Bulstrode was born on 5 July 1522, in Buckinghamshire, England, her father, George Bulstrode, was 37 and her mother, Joan Pigott, was 36. She married Thomas Woodward in 1540, in Buckinghamshire, England. She died on 1 December 1560, in Upton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38, and was buried in Slough, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Bulstrode est née le 5 juillet 1522, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, George Bulstrode, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Joan Pigott, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Woodward en 1540, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Elle est décédée le 1 décembre 1560, à Upton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Slough, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Bulstrode am 5. Juli 1522 in Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater George Bulstrode 37 und ihre Mutter Joan Pigott 36. Sie hat 1540 in Buckinghamshire, England Thomas Woodward geheiratet. Sie starb am 1. Dezember 1560 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Upton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Slough, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Bulstrode è nata il il 5 luglio 1522 nel Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, George Bulstrode, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Joan Pigott, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Woodward nel 1540, nel Buckinghamshire, England. Morì il 1 dicembre 1560, nel Upton, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Slough, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Bulstrodeが1522年7月5日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父George Bulstrodeは37歳，母Joan Pigottは36歳であった。1540年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでThomas Woodwardと結婚した。彼女は1560年12月1日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウプトンで38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアスロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Bulstrode(이)가 1522년 7월 5일 영국 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George Bulstrode(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Pigott(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1540년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 Thomas Woodward(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1560년 12월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 업턴에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 슬루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.5 July 1522–1 December 1560: 5 de julho de 1522–1 de dezembro de 1560
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Bulstrode nasceu em 5 de julho de 1522, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, George Bulstrode, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Joan Pigott, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Woodward em 1540, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 1 de dezembro de 1560, em Upton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Slough, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Bulstrode родилась 5 июля 1522 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени George Bulstrode было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Pigott, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Woodward в 1540 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия. Она умерла 1 декабря 1560 г. в местности уптон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности слоую, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
